title: 2026-06-30 Yakushima Moss Rain Island Life
summary: Yakushima late-June set using yakusugi moss green across a Shiratani Unsuikyo-style forest trail, Yakusugi Museum woodgrain study, rainy guesthouse packing, and Inakahama beach sandal pause.
summaryJa: 屋久島のアルバム。色の軸はモスグリーン。構成はstudio-sports、ミュージアム、室内、水辺。

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman stepping carefully over a wet cedar root on a Shiratani Unsuikyo-style Yakushima moss forest trail, holding a boardwalk rail while wearing a translucent moss-green rain shell, ivory quick-dry sleeveless top, charcoal wrap hiking skort over black bike shorts, matte ribbed ankle socks, trail shoes, and a compact daypack
images.title: 01 Active Shiratani moss trail
images.locationDetail: Shiratani Unsuikyo-style Yakushima moss forest trail

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman comparing cedar cross-section ring samples in a Yakusugi Museum-style wooden study room on Yakushima, with rain on the window and green mountains outside, wearing a sleeveless natural-linen long vest with a moss-green tie sash, white square-neck knit tank, cropped dark olive trousers, flat mules, slim silver jewelry, and holding a notebook
images.title: 02 Gallery Yakusugi woodgrain

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman sitting sideways on a rainy Yakushima guesthouse veranda step, packing dry socks and a folded scarf into a day bag beside a hiking map, woven basket, hanging rain shell, cedar floorboards, mosquito screen, kettle, and wet greenery outside, wearing a moss-green cropped cotton cardigan, white opaque ribbed tank, washed charcoal drawstring shorts, bare legs, and rubber slide sandals
images.title: 03 Home Guesthouse rain packing

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman on a Nagata Inakahama-style Yakushima beach after rain, adjusting a black sandal strap near driftwood with pale sand, dark volcanic rocks, low surf, cloudy sea wind, and green mountains behind her, wearing a deep moss-green one-piece swim bodysuit, open oversized white linen shirt, sand-colored wrap sarong, flat black sandals, and abstract shell-like earrings
images.title: 04 Swim Inakahama sandal
